Title: Customer Contacts - POST /api/contacts/search Still Returns Results After PR #293
Preconditions: Platform API accessible; admin credentials available; at least one contact exists in the system
Steps:
[AUTH] POST {{BACK_URL}}/connect/token grant_type=password&scope=offline_access&username={{ADMIN_EMAIL}}&password={{ADMIN_PASSWORD}} → save bearer token
[HTTP] POST {{BACK_URL}}/api/contacts/search with body: { "skip": 0, "take": 10 } and Authorization: Bearer <token>
[WAIT] response received
Assertions:
[STATUS] HTTP 200 returned
[BODY] response body has totalCount (non-negative integer)
[BODY] response body has items[] array (may be empty if no contacts; should be non-empty on seeded QA)
[SCHEMA] items[] entries have id and memberType fields
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[DB] POST /api/contacts/search after PR #293 — verify same data accessible as pre-PR (regression check)
[CONSOLE] no server errors in platform logs
Failure_Signals: HTTP 500 or 404 on /api/contacts/search; totalCount missing from response; items[] null instead of array; auth rejected (401)
References: Source: VCST-4710 / ba-report-2026-04-23; PR #293 regression check

Title: Customer Contacts - Address Fields Accessible on Contact After PR #293
Preconditions: Platform API accessible; admin credentials available; a contact with at least 1 saved address exists
Steps:
[AUTH] POST {{BACK_URL}}/connect/token → save bearer token
[HTTP] POST {{BACK_URL}}/api/contacts/search with body: { "skip": 0, "take": 5, "deepSearch": true } and Authorization: Bearer <token>
[VAR] Save id of first contact returned as <CONTACT_ID>
[HTTP] GET {{BACK_URL}}/api/contacts/<CONTACT_ID> with Authorization: Bearer <token>
[WAIT] response received
Assertions:
[STATUS] HTTP 200 returned
[BODY] response body has id field matching <CONTACT_ID>
[BODY] response body has addresses[] array (may be empty for contacts without addresses)
[SCHEMA] if addresses[] non-empty: each address has city, countryCode, line1 fields
[BODY] no Internal Server Error or null-reference error in response
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[DB] Address data accessible via REST after IAddressService/IAddressSearchService refactor in PR #293
[CONSOLE] no 500 or exception in platform application logs
Failure_Signals: GET returns 500; addresses field missing from contact JSON; address items have null required fields; regression in address data access
References: Source: VCST-4710 / ba-report-2026-04-23; PR #293 IAddressService regression check
